data.name: Peri

weaponImprint.name: Amanita
weaponImprint.trait: Damage taken is reduced by 2% for every Burn debuff on the attacker, to a maximum reduction of 6%.
weaponImprint.effect: Critical damage from basic attacks is increased by 15%. Each basic attack increases critical damage by 2%/3%/4%/5%/6%/7%, to a maximum of 25%/30%/35%/40%/45%/50%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to Sycca Technologies units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has a Burn debuff, damage is additionally increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A cute little Doll with big dreams, Peri has grown into a strong, independent Doll while following in the footsteps of her master. Her cheerful and lively personality has won the trust of many clients while her wits and experience have allowed her to avoid many pitfalls. All her efforts are to become a super cool and reliable Doll, so why not try relying on her a little?

skills.name: Passionate Gift
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Profit Maximization
skills.description:
At the end of Peri's action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When allied units (apart from Peri) launch [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] that deals Burn damage, Peri gains 1 point of Confectance Index if she has less than 6 points of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered up to once per turn.
After using an active skill, Peri can launch 1 basic attack for every 3 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses. The effect of this basic attack is changed to dealing Burn damage equal to 12% of Peri's initial max HP to an enemy target for each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of Peri's action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When allied units (apart from Peri) launch [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] that deals Burn damage, Peri gains 1 point of Confectance Index if she has less than 6 points of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered up to once per turn.
After using an active skill, Peri can launch 1 basic attack for every 2 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses. The effect of this basic attack is changed to dealing Burn damage equal to 12% of Peri's initial max HP to an enemy target for each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, Peri's maximum stability is increased by 6 stacks. Each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses increases Burn damage dealt by 8%.
At the end of Peri's action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When allied units (apart from Peri) launch [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] that deals Burn damage, Peri gains 1 point of Confectance Index if she has less than 6 points of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered up to once per turn.
After using an active skill, Peri can launch 1 basic attack for every 2 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses. The effect of this basic attack is changed to dealing Burn damage equal to 12% of Peri's initial max HP to an enemy target for each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The number of stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] needed to launch 1 basic attack is reduced by 1.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: At the start of the battle, Peri's maximum stability is increased by 6 points. Each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] she possesses increases Burn damage dealt by 8%.

skills.name: Venture Capital
skills.description: Expends 30% of max HP and gains 2 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] (this effect will not lower HP below 10%). Selects 1 enemy within 6 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to it.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Expends 20% of max HP and gains 2 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] (this effect will not lower HP below 10%). Selects 1 enemy within 6 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to it. For each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] Peri holds, increase the damage multiplier by 10%. Before the attack, cleanses 1 buff from the target.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
HP consumption is reduced by 10%.
For each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] Peri holds, increases the damage multiplier by 10%.
Before the attack, cleanses 1 buff from the target.

skills.name: Excess Order
skills.description: Expends 40% of max HP and gains 3 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] (this effect will not lower HP below 10%). Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy units within 2 tiles, and applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Expends 30% of max HP and gains 3 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] (this effect will not lower HP below 10%). Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy units within 3 tiles, and applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns. For each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] Peri holds, increases the damage multiplier by 5%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
HP consumption is reduced by 10%.
AoE range is increased by 1 tile.
For each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] Peri holds, increases the damage multiplier by 5%.

skills.name: Final Bid
skills.description: Gains 6 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd]. In addition, gains [effect:146f9d18-64f3-4941-872b-d3213e1a0bbd] and [effect:bebcfe15-5173-43c9-bfd1-bcdb4cbfece1] for 3 rounds. [effect:bebcfe15-5173-43c9-bfd1-bcdb4cbfece1] can absorb damage equal to 50% of max HP.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:146f9d18-64f3-4941-872b-d3213e1a0bbd] is enhanced: Damage dealt is increased by 30%. When the expires, recovers all points of stability.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
[effect:146f9d18-64f3-4941-872b-d3213e1a0bbd] gains a new effect: Critical damage dealt by basic attacks is increased by 50%.
[effect:bebcfe15-5173-43c9-bfd1-bcdb4cbfece1] gains a new effect: Before being attacked, the attacker's attack is reduced by 30%.

keys.effect: When attacking the same enemy multiple times, phase damage dealt to it is increased by 10%.

Basic attack now performs two attacks.

[effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] no longer reduces healing efffects.

For each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd], damage taken by all units (other than Peri) is reduced by 5%.

The effects of the Passive skill [dollSkill:6e150036-e26f-46c3-8d43-01e0df9c9db5] are changed. When allied units (other than Peri) deals Burn damage, it triggers her Confectance Index recovery effect.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
Each stack of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] increases Peri's defense by 5%.
At the start of the turn, if Peri has more than 2 stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd], gains 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a].
Peri cleanses all debuffs from self after using the Ultimate Skill.

When afflicted with [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], and [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887], cleanses them immediately and becomes immune to [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], and [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] for 1 turn. Additionally, Peri recovers HP equal to 20% of max HP. This effect has a cooldown of 3 turns.
Damage dealt to enemies with Burn debuffs is increased by 10%.

vertebrae.effect: The number of stacks of [effect:57a15f9e-36c6-4618-9bb0-4b94c538effd] needed to launch 1 basic attack is reduced by 1.

doll.name: Peri
doll.effects: A cute little Doll with big dreams, Peri has grown into a strong, independent Doll while following in the footsteps of her master. Her cheerful and lively personality has won the trust of many clients while her wits and experience have allowed her to avoid many pitfalls. All her efforts are to become a super cool and reliable Doll, so why not try relying on her a little?

imagoforms.effect: When this unit's HP is 50% or lower, damage dealt is increased by 3%, and damage taken is reduced by 3%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
When not protected by cover, damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Max HP is increased by 8%.
When stability is greater than 0, damage dealt is increased by 12%.

Damage dealt is increased by 30%. Critical rate of basic attacks is increased by 100%. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"4b52688b-b310-4510-a5bf-fee6a6978085","upgradeName":"V2","upgradeDetails":"

Damage dealt is increased by 60%. Critical rate of basic attacks is increased by 100%. When the duration ends, the buff holder recovers all points of stability. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0},{"id":"509d4285-f2c8-4826-aa73-9646aaef8450","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

Damage dealt is increased by 60%. Critical rate of basic attacks is increased by 100% and critical damage of basic attacks is increased by 50%. When the duration ends, the buff holder recovers all points of stability. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":1}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Damage taken is reduced by 10%. Healing received is reduced by 10%. At the start of the buff holder's action, number of stacks is reduced by half (rounding up). Maximum of 6 stacks. Cannot be cleansed.
